---
title: "Program chemistry with light"
heading: "Light-driven material chemistries"
blurb: "Many photopolymerization platforms rely on synthetic monomers, chemically modified biopolymers, or initiator systems that are not well-suited to edible or physiologically relevant materials. We develop light-driven chemistries that expand the range of biological and biocompatible substrates that can be crosslinked, solidified, or patterned under controlled illumination."
image: teaser.png
pub_link: "publications/index.qmd#category=vat%20photopolymerization"
date: 2021-05-15
---
